required_directories.purpose: Container for all required workspace folders.
Primary operational workspace for tenant artifacts.
Workspace for discovery, analysis, and reference materials.
Workspace for messaging, campaign, and go-to-market artifacts.

required_files.purpose: Canonical tenant metadata and provisioning parameters.
Declarative mapping of required workspaces and their statuses.
Human-readable summary of tenant workspace structure and usage constraints.
Defines scope and usage policy for the core workspace.
Defines scope and usage policy for the research workspace.
Defines scope and usage policy for the marketing workspace.

invariants.rule: Directory set must include exactly workspaces/core, workspaces/research, and workspaces/marketing in addition to parent folders.
invariants.deterministic_test: Compare normalized directory paths against required_directories.path values and assert all must_exist=true paths exist.

invariants.rule: tenant.json.tenant_type must be one of [single_user, team].
invariants.deterministic_test: Parse tenant.json and assert tenant_type is in allowed enum.
Parse tenant.json and assert exact string equality.

invariants.rule: tenant.json.workspaces must contain exactly [core, research, marketing] with no extras and no omissions.
invariants.deterministic_test: Parse tenant.json.workspaces, sort, and compare to sorted required list.

invariants.rule: All required files must exist and include declared required fields/sections.
invariants.deterministic_test: For JSON files, assert required_fields presence; for markdown files, assert required section headers exist exactly once.

invariants.rule: Placeholders may appear only in files listed by each placeholder definition.
invariants.deterministic_test: Scan all files for placeholder token pattern and verify each token-file pair is whitelisted.

invariants.rule: All paths in config/workspaces.json.workspace_paths must be tenant-relative and start with workspaces/.
invariants.deterministic_test: Parse workspace_paths and assert each matches regex ^workspaces/(core|research|marketing)(/.*)?$.

forbidden_patterns.static_rule: Reject any path value matching regex ^/|^[A-Za-z]:\.

forbidden_patterns.description: Parent directory traversal is not allowed.

forbidden_patterns.static_rule: Reject path strings containing '/tenants/' followed by an identifier not equal to '{{TENANT_ID}}' when placeholder-resolved context is available; otherwise reject any '/tenants/' token.

forbidden_patterns.description: External network references are not allowed in config files.
forbidden_patterns.static_rule: In *.json files, reject values matching regex ^https?:// or ^ssh://.

forbidden_patterns.description: Secrets are not allowed in workspace artifact files.
forbidden_patterns.static_rule: Reject keys or lines matching case-insensitive regex (api[-]?key|secret|token|password|private[_-]?key).

forbidden_patterns.description: Implementation code files are not part of this artifact.
forbidden_patterns.static_rule: Reject files with extensions .js, .ts, .py, .sh, .go, .rb, .java within artifact scope.

acceptance_tests.name: Top-level schema keys are exact
acceptance_tests.procedure: Validate output object has exactly the required top-level keys and no additional keys.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: Pass when key set equals [artifact_name, artifact_type, schema_version, inputs, required_directories, required_files, placeholders, invariants, forbidden_patterns, acceptance_tests].

acceptance_tests.name: Required directories exist
acceptance_tests.procedure: For each required_directories item with must_exist=true, assert directory exists relative to tenant root.

acceptance_tests.name: Required files exist with metadata completeness
acceptance_tests.procedure: Assert each required_files entry includes path, purpose, and allowed_placeholders; assert file exists.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: All files exist and each entry provides purpose and allowed_placeholders.

acceptance_tests.name: tenant.json semantic validation
acceptance_tests.procedure: Parse tenant.json and validate INV-002, INV-003, INV-004.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: tenant_type valid, phase_name exact, workspaces exact set.

acceptance_tests.name: Placeholder policy enforcement
acceptance_tests.procedure: Scan for placeholder tokens and validate token format, allowed file locations, and regex/enum constraints.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: Only declared placeholders appear, in allowed files, with valid resolved values.

acceptance_tests.name: Forbidden pattern scan
acceptance_tests.procedure: Run static checks FP-001 through FP-006 across all artifact files and path fields.

acceptance_tests.name: Path locality compliance
acceptance_tests.procedure: Verify every declared path is tenant-relative, contains no traversal, and does not reference external or cross-tenant locations.
acceptance_tests.expected_result: All paths remain inside tenant root.
